system.description: This skill represents a character's ability to smell and taste. The higher his percentage, the more refined those two senses are, permitting him to detect unfit food and drink, including poisons, with a mere sip; to smell aromatic or foul scents in the air — mere traces of a light perfume, the aroma of a plant, the stink of sulfur; or to distinguish between a refined, well-cooked dish and a simple, reheated garlic soup.
